have hxe : x ∈ (extChartAt I x).source := mem_extChartAt_source I x
  have hu : IsOpen ((extChartAt I x).source ∩ s) := (isOpen_extChartAt_source I x).inter hs
  have hxu : x ∈ (extChartAt I x).source ∩ s := ⟨hxe, hxs⟩
  rw [contMDiffWithinAt_iff_target, and_iff_right ((hf _ (dsmooth_subtype_val.comp 
    (contMDiff_extChartAt_symm.dsmooth (n := hn) (by rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff, 
    contMDiff_iff_contDiff]; exact contDiff_id)))).continuous.continuousWithinAt)]
  apply ContMDiffWithinAt.mono_of_mem_nhdsWithin _ (hu.mem_nhds hxu)
  have hp : IsPlot (hn := hn) (fun y ↦ (⟨(extChartAt I x).symm y, 
    (extChartAt I x).map_target (by simp [hI.range_eq])⟩ : (extChartAt I x).source)) := by
    rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff]; exact contMDiff_extChartAt_symm.subtype_mk _
  have hf' := hf _ (hp.comp (dsmooth_subtype_val (s := (extChartAt I x).target ∩ 
    (extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s)))
  rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] at hf'
  refine (contMDiffWithinAt_inter' ?_).1 (hf'.contMDiffAt (by simp [hI.range_eq])).contMDiffWithinAt
  exact (hu.preimage (continuousOn_extChartAt_symm I x).continuousAt).mem_nhds 
    ⟨(extChartAt I x).map_source hxe, hxu⟩

refine ⟨(hf.continuous.comp continuous_subtype_val).continuousWithinAt, ?_⟩
  rw [contMDiffWithinAt_iff]
  refine ⟨(hf.continuous.comp continuous_subtype_val).continuousWithinAt, ?_⟩
  have hE := FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E
  let e := (chartAt H x).toHomeomorphSourceTarget
  let u := (chartAt H x).source ∩ s
  have hu : IsOpen u := (chartAt H x).open_source.inter hs
  have hxu : x ∈ u := ⟨mem_chart_source H x, hxs⟩
  have : ContMDiff (𝓡 hE) I' ⊤ (f ∘ (chartAt H x).symm ∘ I.symm) := by
    have hp : IsPlot (fun y : Eucl hE ↦ (⟨(chartAt H x).symm (I.symm y),
        (chartAt H x).map_target (hI.isInteriorPoint (I.symm y) ▸ I.symm_map_target (mem_univ y))⟩ : s)) := by
      rw [isPlot_induced_iff, isPlot_iff_contMDiff]
      have h1 : ContMDiff (𝓡 hE) I ⊤ (fun y ↦ (chartAt H x).symm (I.symm y)) := by
        refine contMDiffOn_chart_symm.comp_contMDiff ?_ ?_
        · exact (contMDiff_model_symm (n := ⊤))
        · intro y; exact hI.isInteriorPoint (I.symm y) ▸ I.symm_map_target (mem_univ y)
      exact h1.congr fun y ↦ rfl
    specialize hf hE _ hp
    rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] at hf
    exact hf.congr fun y ↦ rfl
  exact this.contMDiffAt.contMDiffWithinAt

refine ⟨(hf.continuous.restrict_preimage _).continuousWithinAt, ?_⟩
  let e := chartAt H x
  have he : e.source ∈ nhdsWithin x s := by
    apply nhdsWithin_le_nhds
    exact e.open_source.mem_nhds (mem_chart_source H x)
  rw [←contMDiffWithinAt_inter' he]
  apply ContMDiffWithinAt.of_comp_contDiff_euclidean (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E) (I.symm ∘ e)
  · intro y hy
    have hy' := hy.2.2
    simp only [Function.comp_apply]
    rw [I.left_inv (I.source_eq ▸ mem_univ _)]
    exact e.map_source hy'
  · exact (contMDiffOn_chart_symm.comp I.contMDiff.contMDiffOn fun y ↦ I.map_source
      (I.source_eq ▸ mem_univ _)).contDiffOn_of_preimage_isOpen I.continuous_symm.continuousOn
      (e.open_source.preimage I.continuous)
  · have hsub : s ∩ e.source ⊆ s := inter_subset_left
    have hxse : x ∈ s ∩ e.source := ⟨hxs, mem_chart_source H x⟩
    rw [show (chartAt H' (f x) ∘ f ∘ I.symm ∘ e) = (chartAt H' (f x) ∘ f) ∘ (I.symm ∘ e) by rfl]
    apply ContMDiffWithinAt.comp _ _ _ (mapsTo_preimage _ _)
    · have hp : ContMDiff (𝓡 (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E)) I ∞
          (I.symm ∘ (e : M → H) ∘ (↑) : (s ∩ e.source) → M) := by
        apply ContMDiff.comp _ contMDiff_subtype_val
        exact contMDiffOn_chart_symm.comp_contMDiff I.contMDiff fun y ↦ I.map_source
          (I.source_eq ▸ mem_univ _)
      have hplot := hf (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E) ⟨hp, ?_⟩
      · simp only [restrict_eq, Function.comp_apply] at hplot
        rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] at hplot
        have := hplot.contMDiffAt.contMDiffWithinAt (s := range _)
        convert contMDiffOn_chart.contMDiffWithinAt.comp ⟨x, hxse⟩ this (mapsTo_range_iff.2 rfl)
          using 1
        ext y
        simp only [restrict_apply, Subtype.coe_prop, Function.comp_apply, I.left_inv
          (I.source_eq ▸ mem_univ _), e.left_inv y.2.2]
      · intro y
        simp only [restrict_apply, Function.comp_apply, I.left_inv (I.source_eq ▸ mem_univ _),
          e.left_inv y.2.2]
        exact y.2.1
    · exact contMDiffWithinAt_eucl_iff.2 ⟨(I.continuous_symm.comp e.continuousOn_toFun).continuousWithinAt
        (x := x) (s := s ∩ e.source) ⟨hxs, mem_chart_source H x⟩, fun i ↦ contDiffWithinAt_id.congr
        (fun y hy ↦ rfl) rfl⟩

constructor
  · exact (hf.continuous.restrict_preimage hs).continuousWithinAt
  · have hsrc := (chartAt H x).open_source
    have hxsrc : x ∈ (chartAt H x).source := mem_chart_source H x
    let u := s ∩ (chartAt H x).source
    have hu : IsOpen u := hs.inter hsrc
    have hxu : x ∈ u := ⟨hxs, hxsrc⟩
    let φ : E → M := (chartAt H x).symm ∘ I.symm
    have hφ : ContMDiff (𝓘(ℝ, E)) I ∞ φ := by
      apply ContMDiff.comp _ contMDiff_model_symm
      exact contMDiff_chart_symm
    let v := I '' (chartAt H x) '' u
    have hv : IsOpen v := by
      have : v = I.symm ⁻¹' ((chartAt H x) '' u)  := by
        ext y; simp only [v, mem_image, mem_preimage]
        constructor
        · rintro ⟨_, ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
          exact ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩
        · rintro ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩
          exact ⟨(chartAt H x) z, ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩, I.right_inv (hI.range_eq ▸ mem_range_self _)⟩
      rw [this]
      exact I.continuous_symm.isOpen_preimage _ ((chartAt H x).isOpen_image_of_subset_source
        (inter_subset_right) hu)
    have hφv : φ '' v ⊆ u := by
      intro y hy
      simp only [φ, v, mem_image, Function.comp_apply] at hy
      obtain ⟨e, ⟨h, ⟨z, hzu, rfl⟩, rfl⟩, rfl⟩ := hy
      simp only [I.left_inv, (chartAt H x).left_inv hzu.2, hzu]
    have hφv' : ∀ e ∈ v, φ e ∈ u := fun e he ↦ hφv (mem_image_of_mem φ he)
    have hplot : IsPlot[m'.toDiffeology] (f ∘ φ ∘ (↑) : v → N) := by
      have : (f ∘ φ ∘ (↑) : v → N) = (f ∘ (↑)) ∘ (u.restrict φ ∘ Set.inclusion hφv') := by
        ext ⟨e, he⟩; simp [Set.restrict, Set.inclusion]
      rw [this]
      apply hf
      rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff]
      apply ContMDiff.comp (I := I) (f := u.restrict φ) _ _ (fun _ ↦ trivial)
      · exact hφ.restrict _
      · exact (contMDiff_inclusion hφv').of_le le_top
    rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] at hplot
    have hchart_x_in_v : I (chartAt H x x) ∈ v := by
      refine ⟨chartAt H x x, ⟨x, hxu, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    exact (hplot.contMDiffAt (hv.mem_nhds hchart_x_in_v)).contMDiffWithinAt

  refine (this.congr_of_eventuallyEq ?_).contMDiffWithinAt

have hp : IsPlot (Subtype.val : s → M) := isPlot_subtype_val
  have hfp : IsPlot (s.restrict f) := hf _ hp
  rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] at hp hfp
  exact hfp.contMDiffAt.congr_of_eventuallyEq (Filter.eventually_of_forall fun ⟨y, hy⟩ ↦ rfl) rfl

rw [contMDiffWithinAt_iff_target]
  refine ⟨(hs.inter (chartAt H x).open_source).continuousOn.continuousWithinAt hxs', ?_⟩
  have dimE : finrank ℝ E = FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E := rfl
  let e := (chartAt H x).symm.restr (s ∩ (chartAt H x).source)
  have he : ContMDiff (𝓡 (finrank ℝ E)) I ⊤ (fun y : extChartAt I x '' (s ∩ (chartAt H x).source) ↦
      (chartAt H x).symm y.1) := by
    refine ContMDiff.subtype_mk (fun y ↦ ?_) _
    exact (contMDiffOn_chart_symm (x := x)).contMDiffAt
      ((chartAt H x).open_target.mem_nhds ((extChartAt I x).symm.mapsTo y.2).2)
  have he' : ∀ y : extChartAt I x '' (s ∩ (chartAt H x).source),
      (chartAt H x).symm y.1 ∈ s := fun y ↦ ((extChartAt I x).symm.mapsTo y.2).1
  have hp : IsPlot (fun y ↦ ⟨(chartAt H x).symm y.1, he' y⟩) := by
    rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff]; exact ContMDiff.subtype_mk he _
  have hfp := hf hp
  rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] at hfp
  rw [contMDiffWithinAt_iff'] at hfp ⊢
  constructor
  · have := (hfp.1.mono (subset_univ _)).comp (continuousWithinAt_id) (mapsTo_preimage _ _)
    simp only [Function.comp_id] at this
    convert this using 1
    ext y; simp [restrict]
  · have hfp2 := hfp.2 ⟨extChartAt I x x, mem_image_of_mem _ hxs'⟩
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, chartAt_self_eq, PartialHomeomorph.refl_symm,
      PartialHomeomorph.refl_apply] at hfp2
    have : extChartAt I x x ∈ extChartAt I x '' (s ∩ (chartAt H x).source) :=
      mem_image_of_mem _ hxs'
    convert hfp2.mono (fun y hy ↦ ⟨hy.1, ⟨hy.2.1, hy.2.2.1⟩, hy.2.2.2⟩) using 2
    · ext y; simp [restrict, extChartAt, PartialHomeomorph.extend, PartialEquiv.refl_source,
        Function.comp_apply]
    · simp [extChartAt, PartialHomeomorph.extend]
